creator: Arjan.deVet@adv.iae.nl
text:
Sheldon Hearn wrote:

>I can't for the life of me reproduce the problem, but I'd appreciate it
>if you'd try patching the port's patches/patch04 with the diff below and
>let me know how a ``make clean install'' fairs.

Your patch was for an older version I guess but after making this change
to the configure script:

--- configure.orig	Tue Apr 20 17:48:50 1999
+++ configure	Mon May 31 19:42:05 1999
@@ -1157,7 +1157,7 @@
   ;;
   *)
   IFS="${IFS= 	}"; ac_save_ifs="$IFS"; IFS="${IFS}:"
-  for ac_dir in $PATH:$ac_aux_path_sendmail$ac_dummy; do
+  for ac_dir in `echo $PATH:$ac_aux_path_sendmail$ac_dummy | tr ':' ' '`; do
     test -z "$ac_dir" && ac_dir=.
     if test -f $ac_dir/$ac_word; then
       ac_cv_path_SENDMAIL="$ac_dir/$ac_word"

it works.

Arjan
